key.name: rooms
key.description: Each element is a JSON object {id, name, url, hotkey}. Order is display order.

key.name: open-command
key.summary: Command template for opening a room
key.description: %U is replaced with the URL. If %U is absent, URL is appended as the last argument.

key.name: popup-hotkey
key.summary: Hotkey to toggle the popup menu
key.description: GTK accelerator string that shows and hides the Conference Rooms panel menu. Empty array disables the global shortcut.
